title: helianthemoides patens
intro: Helianthemoides patens, also known as Pat's rockrose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as treating wounds, soothing digestive issues, and reducing fever. Helianthemoides patens can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
